sys_hub_flow.name: Certificate Request

sys_hub_flow_input.label: Record
sys_hub_flow_input.name: var__m_sys_hub_flow_input_REMOVED_SECRET

sys_hub_flow_input.label: Table Name
sys_hub_flow_input.name: var__m_sys_hub_flow_input_REMOVED_SECRET

sys_hub_action_instance.comment: Generate certificate via DigiCert One API and keep it in Certificate's table
Update Certificate Request record's status and add success message

sys_element_mapping.value: state=3^close_notes=Your request was approved, and enrollment was created and approved. Check your email, {{Created_1.current.enrollment_email}}, for the following steps.

sys_hub_action_instance.comment: Certificate pick up takes some time that is why we emit events periodically. See Script Action - CertificatePickUpHandler in Studio
Get all users with Business Owner role
Update Certificate Request record's status and add error message

sys_element_mapping.value: state=4^close_notes=Enrollment has not been created because of the following error: {{b29f1fb8-28a7-4b54-bcf5-4f25b26630f3.result.error}}

action_type.display_value: Create enrollment for manual approval and approve it

sys_hub_action_instance.comment: Create enrolment and approve it instantly via DigiCert One API. In this branch, the certificate is not kept in the Certificates table.
At least one of Business Owners has to approve the certificate request
Update Certificate Request record's status and add success message

sys_variable_value.value: state=3^close_notes=Your request was approved and certificate was generated.

sys_hub_action_instance.comment: Update Certificate Request record's status and add error message

sys_element_mapping.value: state=4^close_notes=Certificate has not been generated because of following error: {{e87b27d1-4a0d-475e-9c2f-257262c84f7e.result.error}}

sys_hub_input_scripts.script: {"close_notes":{"scriptActive":false,"savedValue":"The certificate has not been generated because of the following error:\n{{5156e044-4f26-4ebf-bac0-043828775460.__status__.message}}"}}

sys_hub_action_instance.comment: Update Certificate Request record's status and message with rejection reason
Update Certificate Request record's status and add error message

sys_element_mapping.value: state=4^close_notes=Certificate has not been picked up because of following error: {{e87b27d1-4a0d-475e-9c2f-257262c84f7e.result.error}}

sys_variable_value.value: state=3^close_notes=Your request is approved. It will take some time to receive the certificate.

sys_hub_action_instance.comment: Update Certificate Request record's status and add error message

sys_element_mapping.value: state=4^close_notes=Certificate has not been generated because of following error: {{e87b27d1-4a0d-475e-9c2f-257262c84f7e.result.error}}

sys_hub_action_instance.comment: Update Certificate Request record's status and add error message

sys_element_mapping.value: state=4^close_notes=Certificate has not been picked up because of following error: {{e87b27d1-4a0d-475e-9c2f-257262c84f7e.result.error}}

sys_hub_action_instance.comment: Update Certificate Request record's status and add success message

sys_variable_value.value: state=3^close_notes=Your request was approved and certificate was generated.

sys_hub_action_instance.comment: Certificate pick up takes some time that is why we emit events periodically. See Script Action - CertificatePickUpHandler in Studio

sys_variable_value.value: state=3^close_notes=Your request is approved. It will take some time to receive the certificate.

sys_hub_action_instance.comment: Update Certificate Request record's status and add error message

sys_element_mapping.value: state=4^close_notes=Enrollment has not been created because of the following error: {{b29f1fb8-28a7-4b54-bcf5-4f25b26630f3.result.error}}

sys_hub_action_instance.comment: Get all users with Business Owner role
Update Certificate Request record's status and add success message

sys_element_mapping.value: state=3^close_notes=Your request was approved, and enrollment was created and approved. Check your email, {{Created_1.current.enrollment_email}}, for the following steps.

sys_hub_action_instance.comment: Update Certificate Request record's status and message with rejection reason

sys_hub_input_scripts.script: {"close_notes":{"scriptActive":false,"savedValue":"The certificate has not been generated because of the following error:\n{{5156e044-4f26-4ebf-bac0-043828775460.__status__.message}}"}}

action_type.display_value: Create enrollment for manual approval and approve it

action_type_parent.display_value: Create enrollment for manual approval and approve it

sys_hub_action_instance.comment: Create enrolment and approve it instantly via DigiCert One API. In this branch, the certificate is not kept in the Certificates table.
At least one of Business Owners has to approve the certificate request
Generate certificate via DigiCert One API and keep it in Certificate's table
